title: Panel
description: One row per panel configuration used in SAHA spatial omics runs.

panel_name.description: Canonical panel name as used in samples/runs tables (e.g. UCC 1K, 6K Discovery).

platform.description: Platform for which this panel was designed.

assay_type.description: Whether the panel measures RNA or protein targets.

plex.description: Total number of targeted analytes (genes + proteins).

version.description: Panel design version or catalog revision.

protein_list.description: List of targeted protein names or antibody clones.

catalog_number.description: Vendor catalog number for this panel.

notes.description: Free-text notes about panel design or modifications.
